anchors.query: Highway 101 & Betteravia Road, Santa Maria, CA
anchors.why: Described start point: exit Hwy 101 at Betteravia Road heading east

anchors.query: Betteravia Road & Foxen Canyon Road, Santa Maria, CA
anchors.why: Described road name transition: Betteravia Road becomes Foxen Canyon Road

anchors.query: Foxen Canyon Road & Santa Maria Mesa Road, Santa Maria, CA
anchors.why: Described road name transition: Foxen Canyon Road becomes Santa Maria Mesa Road

anchors.query: Santa Maria Mesa Road & Tepusquet Canyon Road, Santa Barbara County, CA
anchors.why: Described road name transition/merge: Santa Maria Mesa Road merges into Tepusquet Canyon Road

anchors.query: Tepusquet Canyon Road & Highway 166, Santa Barbara County, CA
anchors.why: Described junction: north end of Tepusquet Canyon Road reaches Hwy 166
Described end of loop: Hwy 166 west back to Hwy 101, completing the loop
